faqs.question: What is an M3U playlist for IPTV?
faqs.answer: An M3U playlist is a file or URL that contains a list of IPTV channels. You load it into an IPTV player to watch live TV.

faqs.question: How do I use an M3U link?
faqs.answer: Simply copy your M3U URL, open your IPTV player, paste the URL, and start watching instantly.
